name: io.github.TheAiSingularity/agentic-research
description: Local research agent that verifies its own answers. Runs on Gemma 3 4B + Ollama, $0/query.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Default: OpenAI cloud. Use http://localhost:11434/v1 for Ollama.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the endpoint above. Use 'ollama' as a sentinel value when running locally against Ollama.

environmentVariables.name: MODEL_SYNTHESIZER
environmentVariables.description: Model identifier used for the synthesize node. Defaults to 'gpt-5-mini'; set to 'gemma3:4b' for Mac-local Ollama.

environmentVariables.name: MODEL_PLANNER
environmentVariables.description: Model for the plan / classify / critic / compress / verify nodes. Defaults to 'gpt-5-nano'.

environmentVariables.name: EMBED_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Embedding model identifier (for retrieval + memory). Default 'text-embedding-3-small'; use 'nomic-embed-text' on Ollama.

environmentVariables.name: SEARXNG_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the SearXNG meta-search instance. Default http://localhost:8888.

environmentVariables.name: LOCAL_CORPUS_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to an index directory built via scripts/index_corpus.py. When set, local corpus hits augment web search.

environmentVariables.name: ENABLE_RERANK
environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to enable the BAAI/bge-reranker-v2-m3 cross-encoder rerank stage. First run downloads ~560MB.

environmentVariables.name: ENABLE_FETCH
environmentVariables.description: Set to '0' to skip the trafilatura full-page fetch stage. Default '1'.
